# detectOutputDrift

> Compare agent outputs over two time periods to detect drift

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| agentLabel | string | yes |
| baselinePeriod | json | yes |
| currentPeriod | json | yes |

## Steps

```mermaid
graph TD
  A[baselineCalls: call]
  A --> B[currentCalls: call]
  B --> C[baselineHash: call]
  C --> D[currentHash: call]
  D --> E[score: call]
  E --> F[result: return]
```

## Output

Type: `DriftResult`
